title: Black Pozi Countersunk Wood Screws – 3.5 x 25mm – Multi-Purpose Self Tapping Screws for Hardwood, Softwood, MDF & Chipboard – 50 Pack
features: Superior Strength & Durability - Made from premium carbon steel for maximum reliability. Ideal for use with black ironmongery and designed to withstand demanding DIY and professional applications.

Advanced Corrosion Protection - Features a high-performance black coating tested to over 1,000 hours salt spray. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor environments, offering long-lasting resistance to rust.
Clean, Modern Black Finish - The matte black coating blends seamlessly with dark surfaces or creates a striking contrast against lighter materials, enhancing the appearance of any project.
Low-Glare, Discreet Look - Matte finish reduces reflections and helps the screws stay visually unobtrusive — perfect for furniture, shelving, fittings, and visible installations.
Multi-Purpose Application - Ideal for hardwood, softwood, MDF, chipboard, plastic, thin sheet metal and more. A versatile solution for general construction, carpentry, joinery and DIY tasks.
